2026-06-03.content: App Engine supports [Direct VPC egress](https://docs.cloud.google.com/appengine/docs/standard/vpc-direct-vpc) in [Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products#product-launch-stages). Direct VPC egress lets your workloads access VPC network resources as a simpler, more cost-effective [alternative to Serverless VPC Access connectors](https://docs.cloud.google.com/appengine/docs/standard/compare-direct-vpc-egress-connectors).

summary.title: Direct VPC egress for App Engine now in Preview
summary.summary: App Engine now offers Direct VPC egress in Preview. This feature provides a simpler and more cost-effective way for your workloads to access VPC network resources, serving as an alternative to Serverless VPC Access connectors.

2026-05-21.content: The App Engine Migration hub lets you migrate services in the App Engine standard environment to Cloud Run, and also provides cost-saving recommendations. For more information, see [Deploy an App Engine app in the standard environment to Cloud Run](https://docs.cloud.google.com/appengine/migration-center/run/migrate-app-engine-standard-to-run) ([Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products?e=48754805#product-launch-stages)).

summary.title: Migrate App Engine services to Cloud Run
summary.summary: The App Engine Migration hub now supports migrating services from the App Engine standard environment to Cloud Run. This feature also offers recommendations to help you save costs on your migrated services.

summary.title: Ruby 4.0 runtime now available
summary.summary: The Ruby 4.0 runtime for App Engine standard environment is now generally available. This release provides the latest features and improvements for your Ruby applications.

summary.title: Ruby 4.0 runtime now in preview
summary.summary: The Ruby 4.0 runtime is now available in preview. This new runtime allows you to leverage the latest features and performance improvements of Ruby 4.0 within the App Engine standard environment. Update your applications to take advantage of this preview release.

2026-02-12.content:
Support for deploying your existing apps in the standard environment to Cloud Run using
the `gcloud beta app migrate-to-run` command is in [Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products/#product-launch-stages). For more information, see [Deploy an App Engine app in the standard environment to Cloud Run](https://docs.cloud.google.com/appengine/migration-center/run/migrate-app-engine-standard-to-run).

summary.title: Migrate App Engine to Cloud Run
summary.summary: You can now migrate your existing App Engine standard environment apps to Cloud Run using the `gcloud beta app migrate-to-run` command. This feature is currently in Preview and allows for a smoother transition to a more flexible platform. For detailed instructions, refer to the migration documentation.

2025-08-07.content: To increase security, starting in March 2025, support for Transport Layer Security (TLS) version 1.1 and earlier is deprecated. [Update your application settings](https://cloud.google.com/appengine/docs/standard/secure-minimum-tls) in the App Engine standard environment to use TLS version 1.2 and later, along with a corresponding secure set of cipher suites (Preview).

summary.title: TLS 1.1 and earlier deprecated in March 2025

2025-06-17.content: Support for the [Ruby 3.4 runtime](https://cloud.google.com/appengine/docs/standard/ruby/runtime) is in [General Availability (GA)](https://cloud.google.com/products/#product-launch-stages).

summary.title: Ruby 3.4 runtime now available
summary.summary: Ruby 3.4 runtime is now in General Availability.
